sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports no recurrent issues with his carpal tunnel. The patient describes the chest pain as a burning sensation. The patient reports feeling a burning sensation in their chest. The patient states the chest pain is not severe. The patient reports shortness of breath. The patient reports nasal congestion. The patient has allergies.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is mildly low. Heart rate is within normal limits. Neurologic examination is nonfocal. The patient's skin is pale.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has known coronary artery disease and is experiencing chest pressure. The patient's symptoms are concerning for possible cardiac ischemia.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor ordered a physical exam. A stress test will be ordered. A lipid panel will be ordered. The patient will start crestor 20 mg once a day. The patient will continue on aspirin. The patient will continue on toprol.
